title: Arrival of Seafarers. The Department, through the MWAAC, in
content: 53 coordination with OWWA and other government agencies, shall provide assistance to 54 arriving seafarers, particularly those who are in distress. 55 56 57 Illegal Recruitment, Trafficking in Persons, and other Prohibited Acts 58 59
